---
title: ""
listing: 
  contents: photography/astro 
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

# Streetphotos

![](photography/street/wien_park.jpg)

---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](photography/street/wien_trinkbrunnen.jpg){width=40%}

![](photography/street/wien_straße.jpg){width="40%"}
:::
---

![](photography/street/wien_bus.jpg)

---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](photography/street/scarabee2.jpg){width=50%}

![](photography/street/wien_wurstbude1.jpg){width=50%}
:::
